name: Spam Breakfast Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a bowl, beat together SPAM, eggs, and milk.
3. Melt butter in a large skillet; add the egg mixture.
4. Cook until desired doneness is reached.
5. Fill each tortilla with SPAM mixture and half of the cheeses.
6. Roll up each burrito, seam side down, on an 12x8-inch baking dish.
7. Sprinkle remaining cheese over top of burritos.
8. Bake for 5-10 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
9. Serve with salsa.
